summary: Hardened order-cancel.integration.test.ts with concrete assertions on refund amounts, inventory balance restoration, audit log entries, order status history, and error paths (shipped, already-canceled, missing auth, missing reason)

commands_run.command: source .dev/e2e-state/env.sh && cd api && npx vitest run src/order-cancel.integration.test.ts --no-file-parallelism
